schema_object_definitions.name: temp_claim_records
schema_object_definitions.purpose: Hold one future temp-only claim record derived from the selected disabled transaction-plan claim operation.

schema_object_definitions.name: temp_idempotency_records
schema_object_definitions.purpose: Bind the selected claim operation to a temp-only idempotency key before any future temp record write.

schema_object_definitions.name: temp_rollback_records
schema_object_definitions.purpose: Describe how a future temp-only claim record would be removed by temp idempotency key.

schema_object_definitions.name: temp_review_audit_records
schema_object_definitions.purpose: Record prototype design inputs for future temp harness inspection without recording operator promotion approval.

gates_status.message: Contract-test report or source transaction-plan chain reports pass.
Disabled transaction plan is ready only for abort-only harness modeling.
Abort result confirms no product write was attempted or performed.
Product-write design review exists and remains design-only.
The prototype selects the first and only claim operation from the fixture transaction plan.
Future temp DB path pattern is constrained under /tmp.
No product DB path is accepted or emitted by this design.
The temp claim shape references fixture operation metadata only.
The design performs no provider, retrieval, RAG, or source fetching.
The design sends no external handoff.

allowed_future_behavior: create one temp DB file under /tmp
insert one temp review audit record

local_copy_packet.markdown:
# Manual Note Temp DB Single-Claim Prototype Design

Design only. No temp DB file is created now.
No normal product write is enabled.
prototype_status: design_only_ready_for_temp_execution_spec
design_fingerprint: fnv1a32:4670ce1d
selected_claim_operation: disabled-plan-op:claim:001

## Temp Schema Objects
- temp_claim_records: Hold one future temp-only claim record derived from the selected disabled transaction-plan claim operation.
- temp_idempotency_records: Bind the selected claim operation to a temp-only idempotency key before any future temp record write.
- temp_rollback_records: Describe how a future temp-only claim record would be removed by temp idempotency key.
- temp_review_audit_records: Record prototype design inputs for future temp harness inspection without recording operator promotion approval.

## Boundary
temp_db_execution_now=false
product_db_write=false
executable_sql_included=false
sql_executed_now=false
